case_title: CHAN, WENDY VS BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, WENDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL JUDTMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27722 ON DECEMBER 03,2004 EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS.JUDGT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF ALLAN PAUL BRANNAN-APPELLANT AND AGAINST WENDY CHAN, RESPONDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, WENDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,547.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
